params._underlyingAsset: The address of the underlying asset.

params.symbol: The symbol of the hToken's underlying token to fetch the feed for.

returns._0: The AssetPriceInfo containing details about the feed.

params.hToken: The hToken whose price to fetch.

returns._0: price The current price of the hToken's underlying asset.

params.hToken: The hToken whose underlying price to fetch.

returns._0: The price of the underlying asset.

params._comptroller: The address of the Comptroller to associate with this PriceFeed.

setEthPrice(address).details: Sets the price for a given htoken.

params._nativeChainlinkFeed: Address of the native Chainlink feed for this asset
params._prices: The price to set for the asset.
params.hToken: The HToken for which to set the underlying asset price.

params._sequencerUptimeFeed: The address of the sequencer uptime feed.

params.price: The price to set for the underlying asset of the hToken.
params.token: The token whose price is being set.

assetPrices(address).notice: Fetches the price of an asset as set in this contract.

getFeed(string).notice: Retrieves the chainlink feed address for a given token symbol.

getPrice(address).notice: Fetches the current price of a token managed by this contract.

getUnderlyingPrice(address).notice: Fetches the underlying price of a listed hToken asset.

initialize(address).notice: Initializes the contract with a specified Comptroller address.

setPrice(address,uint256,address).notice: Sets the price and associated Chainlink feeds for a given asset.

setSequencerUptimeFeed(address).notice: Sets the address for the sequencer uptime feed which monitors network uptime.

setUnderlyingPrice(address,uint256).notice: Sets the underlying price of an hToken.
